name: kikabon
description: KIKABON - jeu quiz live pour la formation

scripts.build: mkdir public 2>nul || echo. && copy "index (2).html" "public\index.html" && copy "style.css" "public\style.css" && copy "app.js" "public\app.js" && copy "admin.js" "public\admin.js" && copy "game.js" "public\game.js" && echo Build completed - files copied to ./public
